# HookCut

> For a comprehensive version with all 150 articles and detailed feature descriptions, see [llms-full.txt](https://hookcut.com/llms-full.txt)

HookCut is an AI-powered video repurposing tool that automatically clips long-form videos into short viral clips for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts. It adds word-by-word captions, applies face tracking for vertical reframing, and scores each clip by viral potential.

HookCut helps content creators, coaches, podcasters, marketers, and businesses repurpose webinars, interviews, and YouTube videos into multiple short clips in 20–30 minutes instead of hours of manual editing.

HookCut is not affiliated with any other service named HookCut. It is a standalone SaaS product competing with Opus Clip, Descript, Kapwing, and Clipping.

## Product

- **HookCut Home**: AI video clipping — upload any long video, get 8–15 short clips with automatic captions
- **Pricing**: Free plan (3 clips, no credit card), Starter $9/month, Pro $19/month
- **Sign Up Free**: Start with 3 free clips

## How It Works

1. Upload a video file (MP4, MOV) or paste a YouTube or Loom link
2. AI analyzes audio and video signals to find the 8–15 best moments
3. Each clip is automatically reframed to vertical 9:16 with face tracking
4. Word-by-word captions added in chosen style (Hormozi, MrBeast, Classic, Minimal)
5. Each clip receives a viral potential score (0–100)
6. Preview each clip before rendering — only pay credits for clips you keep
7. Export clean MP4 files without watermarks

## Key Features

- AI clip extraction with viral score ranking
- Automatic word-by-word captions: Hormozi style (bold white, color highlight), MrBeast style, Classic, Minimal
- Face tracking for automatic 9:16 vertical reframing of horizontal video
- Preview before rendering (unique differentiator — competitors render before showing)
- Per-clip pricing (not per-minute of input video like Opus Clip)
- YouTube link import, Loom recording support
- No watermarks on any plan including free
- Supports videos up to 4 hours long

## Pricing

- **Free**: 3 clips, no time limit, no credit card required
- **Starter**: $9/month — for individual creators
- **Pro**: $19/month — for active creators and agencies

- [0 to 10,000 Followers with Short-Form Video](https://hookcut.com/blog/0-to-10000-followers-short-form-video): Phase-by-phase growth guide
- [Short-Form Video Analytics Guide 2026](https://hookcut.com/blog/short-form-video-analytics-guide-2026): Metrics that actually predict growth
- [Build a Personal Brand with Short-Form Video](https://hookcut.com/blog/build-personal-brand-short-form-video): Personal brand strategy
